name: MemberFlow
tagline: Automate onboarding & retention for paid communities
short_description: Automated DM + onboarding sequences that increase member activation and reduce churn
long_description: MemberFlow automates welcome messages, drip sequences, and retention flows for creators. Connect your community, pick or generate a campaign, and MemberFlow sends targeted lifecycle messages on triggers (join, inactivity, upgrade). Built as a lightweight SaaS to increase retention and revenue without manual outreach.

permissions.justification: List members so creators can target and segment their community
Send DMs and apply tags/roles as part of onboarding sequences
Show subscription status for members (optional analytics)
Register webhook endpoints to receive real-time member events
